artifact.runtime_contract: Standard-library-only deterministic graph closure over strings, integers, and booleans; validator host and wall-clock time are excluded from canonical bytes and are not validation gates.

claim_boundary: This is a deterministic network-zero migration and contaminated repair regression over one frozen synthetic v0.5.2 walkthrough.
The canonical v0.5.2 artifact, its strict walkthrough_contract_passed=false verdict, public card, raw evidence, receipts, and provider output remain byte-frozen and are not regraded or rewritten.
The lossless typed graph must reproduce both known fact-local lineage gaps before the separately pinned two-edge repair overlay is applied.
The repair overlay was designed after observing the v0.5.2 defect and is contaminated engineering evidence, not fresh generalization evidence.
Closure gold is a post-graph grading input only and is excluded from migration, graph construction, and overlay application.
No provider, semantic adapter, hidden model state, final generation, token usage, latency, or server behavior participates in v0.5.3.

A repaired exact closure PASS establishes this local public-lineage representation contract only; it does not establish causal superiority, reasoning-quality improvement, autonomous dependency discovery, or production readiness.
Canonical artifacts contain no observed runtime, timestamp, hostname, or absolute repository path; cross-runtime identity is claimed only where independently executed and compared.

closure_gold.relationship: grading input only; excluded from graph construction and closure

source_fixture.relationship: frozen raw-evidence and public temporal binding input to lossless migration only

predecessor.relationship: immutable hosted predecessor and known strict near-pass; canonical bytes are migration input and provenance only
